title: Ladies' Night in a Turkish Bath
writer: Charlton Andrews, Al Boasberg, Avery Hopwood
actors: Dorothy Mackaill, Jack Mulhall, Sylvia Ashton
plot: Ma and Pa Slocum sell up their thriving packed-lunch business (based on Ma's home cooking, Pa's packaging design, and pretty daughter Helen's salesmanship), and move 'uptown' to live the life of the idle rich on the proceeds. But ...
